data.body: Closing evidence, 2026-07-10 ~17:10 UTC. AC1 (converges): box deployed main tip add9b7599 (the merge of the 5 hardening changes) — autodeploy journal shows 'up to date; no-op', zero AUTODEPLOY_ERROR since the on-box fix; deploy_errors alarm OK. AC2 (real votes): Gerrit changes 488-492 each received substantive LLM-Review +1 votes from the bot post-deploy (and Verified +1), then merged — the gate is fully functional, no coverage-gap vetoes since. AC3: change 452's stale coverage-gap veto cleared via /rerun during the on-box remediation session. AC4 (follow-ups filed + linked discovered_from): e991 (compose-up volume fix — CLOSED, merged 488), b005 (CI volume-drift gate — CLOSED, 489), e2c5 (failure-path docker prune — CLOSED, 490), ac14 (alarm cadence + root-disk alarm — CLOSED, 491 + terraform applied, metric flowing), e7f4 (snapshot janitor wiring — CLOSED, 492), aa5a (macOS CI flake), f600 (operator: PAT/SSM provisioning — still open), e983 (operator: Gerrit config apply — still open), plus 4 advisory ideas (c6d7/5e66/7aa7/507c) and 2 new bugs from ac14 verification (8a37 probe exit-1, 1d63 stale materialized scripts). Root disk 29% used with a >85% alarm now watching it.
